Bash(# Agent ID 정리 \(대전, 인포로컬, Loader, SND, 내부망\)
curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/agents 2>/dev/null | python -c "
import json,sys
agents = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
targets = ['daejeon','infoworld-local','loader','snd','internal']
for a in agents:
    if any\(t in a['agentCode'] for t in targets\):
        print\(f\\"id:{a['id']:3d}  code:{a['agentCode']:<35s}  type:{a['agentType']}  status:{a['status']}\\"\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# 큰산 Agent 확인
curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/agents 2>/dev/null | python -c "
import json,sys
agents = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for a in agents:
    if 'keunsan' in a['agentCode']:
        print\(f\\"id:{a['id']}  code:{a['agentCode']}  type:{a['agentType']}  status:{a['status']}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  source: {a['sourceDatasourceId']}  target: {a['targetDatasourceId']}\\"\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# 큰산 스케줄 확인
curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/schedules 2>/dev/null | python -c "
import json,sys
for s in json.load\(sys.stdin\):
    print\(f\\"id:{s['scheduleId']}  agent:{s['agentCode']:<35s}  cron:{s['cronExpression']}  enabled:{s['isEnabled']}\\"\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# 전체 Agent 상태 확인
curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/agents 2>/dev/null | python -c "
import json,sys
for a in json.load\(sys.stdin\):
    print\(f\\"id:{a['id']:3d}  {a['agentCode']:<35s}  status:{a['status']:<8s}  lastExec:{a.get\('lastExecutionStatus','?'\)}\\"\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# internal-bojo-rcv를 먼저 실행해야 하는지 확인
# rcv는 if_snd → if_rsv로 데이터를 넣으니까, 그 전에 dmz-bojo-snd가 실행되어야 함
# 풀 체인 확인
curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/chains 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
chains = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for c in chains:
    print\(f\\"Chain {c['id']}: {c['chainName']}\\"\)
    for m in c.get\('members', []\):
        print\(f\\"  {m['executionOrder']}. {m.get\('agentCode', m.get\('agentId'\)\)}\\"\)" 2>/dev/null)

PowerShell($svcs = @\(@{p=8080;n="backend"},@{p=8093;n="proxy-internal"},@{p=8092;n="bojo-internal"}\); foreach \($s in $svcs\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$\($s.p\)/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "{0,5} {1,-15} HTTP {2}" -f $s.p, $s.n, $r.StatusCode } catch { $code = if \($_.Exception.Response\) { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } else { $null }; if \($code\) { "{0,5} {1,-15} HTTP {2}" -f $s.p, $s.n, $code } else { "{0,5} {1,-15} fail" -f $s.p, $s.n } } })
